selections.name: Tarantino
selections.reason: Massive class drop from Graded Stakes company down to $50k claiming. Boasts a 109 speed figure and 110 class rating, making him a standout against this field.

selections.name: Goldeneye
selections.reason: Owns the highest overall speed figure in the field (113). Has been facing much tougher company and gets Flavien Prat in the irons.

selections.name: Hurry Hurry
selections.reason: Consistent runner with a solid 108 speed figure. Has tactical speed to sit a good trip just off the pace.

selections.name: Badge Of War
selections.reason: Draws the rail and possesses good early speed (103 figure). Can control the pace or sit a pocket trip.

danger_horse.name: Carolo Rapido
danger_horse.reason: Consistent pace figures and has won at this level previously. A legitimate threat if the pace melts down.

selections.name: Country Club
selections.reason: Strong class and speed combination (98 speed, 98 class). Gets top jockey Flavien Prat and should get a perfect stalking trip.

selections.name: Tutta Bella
selections.reason: Boasts the highest speed figure in the field at 101. Has been running against tougher maiden/claiming company and fits well here.

selections.name: Bartender
selections.reason: Gets Irad Ortiz Jr. from the inside post. Highest class rating in the field (99) and should save all the ground.

selections.name: Tiz Salty
selections.reason: Solid closer with a 97 speed figure. Will benefit if the early pace gets contested.

danger_horse.name: Romany Road
danger_horse.reason: Very consistent at this class level and has tactical speed to stay out of trouble.

selections.name: Gus's Gal
selections.reason: Highest speed figure in the main body of the field (101). Luis Saez takes the mount, signaling strong intent.

selections.name: Chasing Sunsets
selections.reason: Flavien Prat rides this filly who posted a solid 97 speed figure. Should be prominent early.

selections.name: Mo Town Renee
selections.reason: Faded last time but owns a 103 speed figure at her best. Outside draw keeps her out of kickback.

selections.name: Red Raze
selections.reason: Has a 92 speed figure and has been working well in the mornings. Good value for the bottom of exotics.

danger_horse.name: Cloud Number Nine
danger_horse.reason: Dropping in class and has a 95 speed figure that makes her competitive here.

selections.name: Noble Anthem
selections.reason: Drawn perfectly on the rail with Irad Ortiz Jr. aboard. Owns a field-best 109 speed figure and should control the race.

selections.name: Nomolimbo
selections.reason: Strong 108 speed figure and gets Luis Saez. Will be applying pressure to the top pick throughout.

selections.name: Up Country
selections.reason: Tyler Gaffalione rides this consistent runner who boasts a 104 speed figure. Outside post is the only slight negative.

selections.name: Kingsmere
selections.reason: Solid 105 speed figure and gets Joel Rosario. Can close into the exotics if the pace is hot.

danger_horse.name: Oubliette
danger_horse.reason: Has a solid 104 speed figure and could surprise at a price.

selections.name: Final Story
selections.reason: Absolute standout with a massive 111 speed figure. Irad Ortiz Jr. rides for Brad Cox. Looks very tough to beat.

selections.name: Radar Lock
selections.reason: Second-best speed figure in the field at 109. Jose Ortiz takes the mount and should get a clean outside trip.

selections.name: Mouqeer
selections.reason: Posted a 106 speed figure and gets John Velazquez. Solid contender for the underneath spots.

selections.name: Our Forefathers
selections.reason: Has a 102 speed figure and draws the rail. Can save ground and hit the board.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Single #7 in multi-race wagers. Exacta 7 / 4,10, Trifecta 7 / 4,10 / 1,4,10

selections.name: Beautiful War
selections.reason: Owns a towering 124 speed figure. If she can overcome the outside post, she has the raw talent to dominate this group.

selections.name: Knoty Knicks
selections.reason: Strong 116 speed figure and draws well inside. Corey Lanerie should have him perfectly positioned.

selections.name: Gairloch
selections.reason: Tied for second-highest speed figure (116). Tyler Gaffalione rides and should be a major factor.

selections.name: Patrol Squad Six
selections.reason: Consistent turf runner with a 112 speed figure. Can close well late.

danger_horse.name: Noble Dynasty
danger_horse.reason: Consistent 110 speed figure and has back class that makes him dangerous.

selections.name: Tamino
selections.reason: Highest speed figure in a very competitive field (115). Outside draw is fine for this distance.

selections.name: Nation
selections.reason: Tyler Gaffalione rides this runner who boasts a 111 speed figure. Inside draw is a big plus.

selections.name: Elnajd
selections.reason: Irad Ortiz Jr. takes the mount on this 110 speed figure horse. Will be heavily backed and is a major player.

selections.name: Dr. Park
selections.reason: Flavien Prat rides from the rail. 110 speed figure puts him right in the mix.

danger_horse.name: Northern Chill
danger_horse.reason: Has a 111 speed figure and could offer great value at a price.

selections.name: Schwarzenegger
selections.reason: Tied for the highest speed figure in the field (120). John Velazquez rides and should get a great stalking trip.

selections.name: Intricate Spirit
selections.reason: Also boasts a 120 speed figure. Joel Rosario is excellent on turf sprinters and will be flying late.

selections.name: Track Tiger
selections.reason: Has a 118 speed figure and draws the rail. Can save all the ground and surprise at a price.

selections.name: Throckmorton
selections.reason: Solid 114 speed figure and gets Luis Saez. Consistent performer in these turf dashes.

danger_horse.name: Sandal's Song
danger_horse.reason: Irad Ortiz Jr. rides, and a 111 speed figure makes him a legitimate threat.

selections.name: Tom's Cruising
selections.reason: Highest speed figure in the field at 103. John Velazquez takes the mount and should be tough to beat.

selections.name: Quarry
selections.reason: Tyler Gaffalione rides this runner who posted a 101 speed figure. Should get a great trip from the inside.

selections.name: Asheville
selections.reason: First-time starter for Brad Cox with Irad Ortiz Jr. aboard. Huge trainer/jockey angle.

selections.name: The Hund
selections.reason: Has a 99 speed figure and draws the rail. Can save ground and hit the board.

danger_horse.name: Bod Beach
danger_horse.reason: Solid 99 speed figure and has experience that could prove valuable here.
